Name: FCustomChannelSetup
Description: Structure for custom channel setup information.

Variables.Name: Channel
Variables.Description: Which channel you'd like to customize

Variables.Name: Name
Variables.Description: Name of channel you'd like to show up

Variables.Name: bTraceType
Variables.Description: Sets meta data TraceType="1" for the enum entry if true. Otherwise, this channel will be treated as object query channel, so you can query object types

Variables.Name: bStaticObject
Variables.Description: Specifies if this is static object. Otherwise it will be dynamic object. This is used for query all objects vs all static objects vs all dynamic objects
